What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A hand with silver nail polish holds a decorated cupcake featuring pink frosting, green grass, and pastel eggs. Twelve plain yellow cupcakes sit in white liners on a dark grey surface arranged in a grid. The hand uses a piping bag to apply pink frosting swirls onto the plain cakes. Text reading "Easy Easter Cupcakes" appears at the bottom of the screen.

Describe the sequence of applying the pink frosting base to the cupcakes as shown in the video.
canonical_answer: At 6s, a hand pipes pink frosting onto a plain cupcake; at 8s, frosting is applied to the top-left cupcake in a grid; at 14s, the second cupcake in the row is fully frosted; at 16s, the hand begins piping onto the third cupcake in the top row.
